attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
EX.ACTION_CD,                     
EX.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
EX.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
EX.BATCH_ID,                      
EX.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EX.CREATION_DATE,                 
EX.ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
EX.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,         
EX.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
EX.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX.ORDER_LINE_ID,                 
EX.REASON_CODE,                   
EX.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
EX.SAV_ID,                        
EX.SAV_MEMBER_ID,   
EX.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,              
EX.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
EX.START_DATE,                    
EX.STATUS_CODE,                   
EX.TRX_ORIG_CODE,                 
EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
EX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,               
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.VALIDATION_DATE,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM UCRM_CASE_NUM /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
         
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX  EX                
WHERE EX.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX   STG
WHERE STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID=EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID)

SELECT
	NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY        		  		MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
    BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT                  		BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
    SPMT.START_DATE       START_TV_DTM,
    COALESCE(SPMT.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  END_TV_DTM,
        NP.PARTY_KEY                      			FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
	NPS.PARTY_KEY     					SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
	NPSV.PARTY_KEY     					SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ENRICHMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')          ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,'MANUAL')        		ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
        COALESCE((SPMT.SPLIT_PERCENT*100),0)         		END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
	COALESCE(SPMT.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                  			NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
	COALESCE(SPMT.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,'=')              		OWNED_FLG,
	COALESCE(SPMT.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,'UNKNOWN')           	HQ_REMOTE_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,'UNKNOWN')     	ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')      		VALIDATION_MODE_CD,
	COALESCE(SPMT.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')           		VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
	COALESCE(NES.ERP_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                 	LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,
	SPMT.VALIDATION_DATE          			         LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
	SPMT.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID           			SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,	
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  							EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER  							EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	SPMT.UCRM_CASE_NUM AS UCRM_CASE_NUM, /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
	SPMT.ACTION_CD						ACTION_CODE,
	'I'							DML_TYPE
FROM 
    $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX SPMT
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	ON SPMT.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID=NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
	ON SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID=NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPS.SS_CODE='CR'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
	ON SPMT.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
	ON SPMT.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
	ON SPMT.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
	AND SPMT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD)
	AND SPMT.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
        ON SPMT.SAV_MEMBER_ID =BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
    LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_NO_VLD_SA_GRP_PTY_RSN_BIZKEY NNVSGPRB 
	ON SPMT.REASON_CODE = NNVSGPRB.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MANUAL_TRX_KEY,BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,START_TV_DTM,ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT
ACTION_CD ,                    
ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
BATCH_ID,                      
CREATE_DATETIME ,              
CREATION_DATE  ,               
ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE, 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,         
EXPIRATION_DATE,               
HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
ORDER_LINE_ID,                 
REASON_CODE,                   
SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
SAV_ID  ,                      
SAV_MEMBER_ID , 
SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,               
SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
START_DATE,                    
STATUS_CODE,                   
TRX_ORIG_CODE,                 
TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,               
USER_NAME,
VALIDATION_DATE,
UCRM_CASE_NUM /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
FROM  
 $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_MNL_TRX   STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX WK
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
ON STG.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE=TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD)
AND STG.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND WK.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
AND WK.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT=STG.SAV_MEMBER_ID
AND STG.START_DATE=WK.START_TV_DTM)
